header.title: All Calculators
header.sub: Smart tools and calculators to help you plan, budget and make confident property decisions.
header.help_desc: Our guides explain how each calculator works and what the results mean.

calculators.title: Stamp Duty Calculator
calculators.desc: Calculate how much Stamp Duty Land Tax you'll pay when buying.

calculators.title: Mortgage Affordability Calculator
calculators.desc: See how much you can borrow and what you can afford.

calculators.title: Buying Cost Calculator
calculators.desc: Estimate all the costs involved in buying a property.

calculators.title: Selling Cost Calculator
calculators.desc: Work out the total costs of selling your home.

calculators.title: Rent vs Buy Calculator
calculators.desc: Compare the cost of renting versus buying over time.

calculators.title: Moving Cost Calculator
calculators.desc: Estimate the total cost of your house move.

calculators.title: Survey Cost Estimator
calculators.desc: Estimate survey costs for the property you're buying.

calculators.title: Mortgage Overpayment Calculator
calculators.desc: See how overpayments can reduce your loan and save interest.

calculators.title: Land Transaction Tax Calculator
calculators.desc: Calculate Land Transaction Tax (Scotland) on property purchases.
